dialogos.texto_en: (No good.\n Itsuki can't even look me in the eye.)
(During breakfast and even when we gathered\n in the lobby, she's been sulking the whole time...\n She must still be angry...)
(There's no sign of her\n being willing to accept an apology,\n so how should I act around her?)
Futaro, you look pale. What's wrong?
N-no, nothing really.
(If Itsuki had talked to her sisters about what happened\n yesterday, I'd have gotten the crap kicked outta me already.\n So, does that mean she hasn't told anyone yet?)
(...Damnit, what am I relieved about?\n Even if I get beat up, I can't complain.\n I should just accept it!)
Big bro?\nYou've been making a strange face for a while now.
Don't worry about it.
Oh, but I am worried...
(We're supposed to go to the beach today.\n I have to somehow make time to talk to Itsuki.)
(Even if...she probably doesn't want to look at my face.)
Ummm, so today we were planning to enjoy swimming\nand marine activities%p-2;――
But, we've had a change of plans.
Huh?
You don't mind, right, Fu-kun?
Uh, yeah, that's fine.
So, it's settled then!
Yeah, it's settled.
Wh-what the?\nWhat's with that wicked smile?
Well, today will be a completely free day.\nLet's all go play wherever we want!
However, Futaro will be with Itsuki.
Huh? Wha?\nMe, and Itsuki, the two of us?
Yep. The two of you.
W-wait a minute!\nWhy does it have to be like that!?
Hm? I'd rather ask you the reason\nyou need to ask why?\nAs lovers, don't you want to be together?
Yeah, yeah, that's right.
B-but doesn't Itsuki have a say in this?\nYou can't just decide on your own.
I want to be together with you.
...Huh?
Wh-why...?
(Even though THAT had \n just happened yesterday...)
I want to be with you%p-2;――\n%p;don't you think that's reason enough?
...No, that's a good reason.
...If you're okay with that.
Didn't you hear?\nI said that I want to be together with you.
Y-yeah... That's right.\nSorry, I asked something weird.
Me too.\nI wanna be with you too.
(Even if she ends up hating me,\n I still like Itsuki.)
(If we keep silent like this,\n our feelings for each other might truly be cut off!)
Oh, good.\nWe feel the same way.
If you come back to the hotel by evening,\nyou're free to do as you please.\nOh, but don't do anything dangerous, okaaay?
Well then, let's enjoy Okinawa however we like!
Okay!
I wonder where I'll go.
...They all left in a flash.
The day would end quickly if they just sat around.
Th-that's right.
(Things are...pretty normal.\n I just don't get it.\n What does she think about what happened yesterday?)
Uesugi-kun?
Ah, um, Itsuki...\nIs there somewhere you wanna go?
Umm, let's see...
We were going to go there tomorrow,\nbut how about Ocean Expo Park?
That's where Churaumi Aquarium is, right?\nThat's good, let's go there.
Alright, let's go.
Yeah.
(I don't know what she's thinking...\n But Itsuki said she wants to be with me.)
(For now, I have no choice\n but to believe in those words and move forward.)
